list.name: family_id
list.label: Family ID
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT family_id AS __value, CAST(family_id AS CHAR) AS __text FROM TRAFFIC_DEDUCT_DONE ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT family_id AS __value, CAST(family_id AS CHAR) AS __text FROM TRAFFIC_DEDUCT_DONE ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Total Deducted Bytes
panels.description: Selected family's total deducted bytes over the dashboard time range.

panels.title: Processed Events
panels.description: Number of completed deduction events in the selected time range.

panels.title: Current Remaining Data
panels.description: Most recent remaining shared data for the selected family.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(finished_at) AS time_sec,
       api_remaining_data AS value
FROM TRAFFIC_DEDUCT_DONE
WHERE family_id = ${family_id}
  AND $__timeFilter(finished_at)
ORDER BY finished_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(finished_at, '5m'),
       COALESCE(SUM(deducted_total_bytes), 0) AS value
FROM TRAFFIC_DEDUCT_DONE
WHERE family_id = ${family_id}
  AND $__timeFilter(finished_at)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Usage By Line
panels.description: Stacked time series showing which line consumed the shared data.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(finished_at, '5m'),
       CAST(line_id AS CHAR) AS metric,
       COALESCE(SUM(deducted_total_bytes), 0) AS value
FROM TRAFFIC_DEDUCT_DONE
WHERE family_id = ${family_id}
  AND $__timeFilter(finished_at)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1, 2;

panels.title: Remaining Shared Data Over Time
panels.description: Timeline of remaining family shared data after each deduction event.

panels.title: Top Lines By Usage
panels.description: Top line_ids by deducted bytes in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT CAST(line_id AS CHAR) AS line_id,
       COALESCE(SUM(deducted_total_bytes), 0) AS deducted_bytes
FROM TRAFFIC_DEDUCT_DONE
WHERE family_id = ${family_id}
  AND $__timeFilter(finished_at)
GROUP BY line_id
ORDER BY deducted_bytes DESC
LIMIT 10;

panels.title: Events By Final Status
panels.description: Distribution of event outcomes for the selected family.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT final_status,
       COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM TRAFFIC_DEDUCT_DONE
WHERE family_id = ${family_id}
  AND $__timeFilter(finished_at)
GROUP BY final_status
ORDER BY event_count DESC;

panels.title: Events By Lua Status
panels.description: Distribution of the last Lua decision/status.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(last_lua_status, 'UNKNOWN') AS last_lua_status,
       COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM TRAFFIC_DEDUCT_DONE
WHERE family_id = ${family_id}
  AND $__timeFilter(finished_at)
GROUP BY COALESCE(last_lua_status, 'UNKNOWN')
ORDER BY event_count DESC;

panels.title: Threshold Crossing Events (10 MB)
panels.description: Who consumed data when the remaining shared data dropped to 10 MB or less.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT finished_at,
       line_id,
       family_id,
       deducted_total_bytes,
       api_remaining_data,
       final_status,
       COALESCE(last_lua_status, 'UNKNOWN') AS last_lua_status,
       trace_id
FROM TRAFFIC_DEDUCT_DONE
WHERE family_id = ${family_id}
  AND $__timeFilter(finished_at)
  AND api_remaining_data <= 10 * 1024 * 1024
ORDER BY finished_at DESC
LIMIT 100;

panels.title: Recent Deduct Records
panels.description: Latest deduction records for the selected family.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT finished_at,
       line_id,
       family_id,
       app_id,
       deducted_total_bytes,
       api_total_data,
       api_remaining_data,
       final_status,
       COALESCE(last_lua_status, 'UNKNOWN') AS last_lua_status,
       trace_id
FROM TRAFFIC_DEDUCT_DONE
WHERE family_id = ${family_id}
  AND $__timeFilter(finished_at)
ORDER BY finished_at DESC
LIMIT 200;
